'''Zabrak blaster pistols''' were a common sight among [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. These weapons were known for their accuracy and the damage they would inflict on their targets.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
